--- match_complex.sql
GRAPH g
MATCH ANY SHORTEST (a:Person {name: "Alice"})-[:KNOWS]->{1, 5}(b:Person)
WHERE a.age > 20
RETURN a, b

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 7,
          Name:    "g",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            Optional: -1,
            Match:    8,
            Pattern:  &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  SearchPrefix: &ast.GQLPathSearchPrefix{
                    StartPos: 14,
                    EndPos:   26,
                    Prefix:   "ANY SHORTEST",
                  },
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  27,
                          Rparen:  52,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 28,
                              NameEnd: 29,
                              Name:    "a",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 29,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 30,
                                  NameEnd: 36,
                                  Name:    "Person",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                            Properties: &ast.GQLProperties{
                              Lbrace: 37,
                              Rbrace: 51,
                              Fields: []*ast.GQLPropertyField{
                                &ast.GQLPropertyField{
                                  Name: &ast.Ident{
                                    NamePos: 38,
                                    NameEnd: 42,
                                    Name:    "name",
                                  },
                                  Value: &ast.StringLiteral{
                                    ValuePos: 44,
                                    ValueEnd: 51,
                                    Value:    "Alice",
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  53,
                          EndPos:    64,
                          Direction: "RIGHT",
                          Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Label:    &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 55,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 56,
                                  NameEnd: 61,
                                  Name:    "KNOWS",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                        Quantifier: &ast.GQLBoundedQuantifier{
                          Lbrace: 64,
                          Rbrace: 69,
                          Low:    &ast.IntLiteral{
                            ValuePos: 65,
                            ValueEnd: 66,
                            Base:     10,
                            Value:    "1",
                          },
                          High: &ast.IntLiteral{
                            ValuePos: 68,
                            ValueEnd: 69,
                            Base:     10,
                            Value:    "5",
                          },
                          Comma: 66,
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  70,
                          Rparen:  79,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 71,
                              NameEnd: 72,
                              Name:    "b",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 72,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 73,
                                  NameEnd: 79,
                                  Name:    "Person",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
              Where: &ast.Where{
                Where: 81,
                Expr:  &ast.BinaryExpr{
                  Op:   ">",
                  Left: &ast.Path{
                    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                      &ast.Ident{
                        NamePos: 87,
                        NameEnd: 88,
                        Name:    "a",
                      },
                      &ast.Ident{
                        NamePos: 89,
                        NameEnd: 92,
                        Name:    "age",
                      },
                    },
                  },
                  Right: &ast.IntLiteral{
                    ValuePos: 95,
                    ValueEnd: 97,
                    Base:     10,
                    Value:    "20",
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 98,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 105,
                  NameEnd: 106,
                  Name:    "a",
                },
              },
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 108,
                  NameEnd: 109,
                  Name:    "b",
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH g MATCH ANY SHORTEST (a:Person {name: "Alice"})-[:KNOWS]->{1,5}(b:Person) WHERE a.age > 20 RETURN a, b
